description.value: A stummer cancels out surrounding noise, granting a +30 bonus to Silent Move tests. Each use lasts 20 minutes before needing a one-hour recharge.
description.summary: A stummer grants a +30 bonus to Silent Move tests for 20 minutes before needing a one-hour recharge.

system.effect: A stummer grants a +30 bonus to Silent Move tests for 20 minutes before needing a one-hour recharge.
